tool.name: Mac Network Info
tool.description: Get network interface information including IP addresses and WiFi details.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_network_info
Get network interface information.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_network_info", "query": ""}
```

**Returns:** interfaces (name, ipv4Address, ipv6Address, isUp, isLoopback), wifiSSID
